zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny於1440年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比 卡素時，他的父親Edward Neville28歲，母親Elizabeth Beauchamp25歲。他於1471年5月1日之前與Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1492年9月20日在英國英格蘭素可列維斯享年52歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny was born in 1440, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edward Neville, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Beauchamp, was 25. He married Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny before 1 May 1471, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 20 September 1492, in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny est né en 1440, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Neville, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Beauchamp, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny avant 1 mai 1471, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1492, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kin: Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny 1440 in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Neville 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Beauchamp 25. Er hat vor 1. Mai 1471 in England Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 20. September 1492 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavennyが1440年にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Edward Nevilleは28歳，母Elizabeth Beauchampは25歳であった。1471年5月1日以前にイギリスでMargaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavennyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1492年9月20日にイギリスイギリススセックスルスで52歳で死去し，イギリススセックスルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny(이)가 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Neville(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Beauchamp(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1471년 5월 1일 이전 영국에서 Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 9월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny nasceu em 1440, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Neville, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Beauchamp, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny antes 1 de maio de 1471, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1492, em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny родился в 1440 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edward Neville было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Beauchamp, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny перед 1 май 1471 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 20 сентября 1492 г. в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny nació en 1440, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward Neville, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Beauchamp, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny antes de 1 de mayo de 1471, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1492, en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
